evidence.assessment: The requirement to validate the 'Instagram bio link integration' is not directly supported by the evidence provided. While there are successful booking transactions, there is no explicit confirmation of the Instagram Business account's configuration with the necessary booking integration. This lack of direct evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
